title: SiTime Q1 2026 Earnings - 88% Revenue Growth on AI Momentum
text: SiTime reported first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of $113.6M, up 88% year over year, with non-GAAP EPS of $1.44, beating Wall Street expectations of $103.45M and $1.16. Q1 2026 saw 88% revenue growth, record gross and operating margins, and strong CED performance, driven by AI infrastructure demand. The company announced the expiration of the Hart-Scott-Rodino waiting period on May 11, 2026, advancing the Renesas Timing Business Acquisition. The company introduced a new Elite 2 Super-TCXO timing device targeting AI data centers, aiming at a cumulative $1.5B market by 2030, with volume production planned for Q3 2026. Multiple analysts raised price targets following earnings, with Roth Capital increasing its target to $900 from $450 and Goldman Sachs to $800 from $435.
